
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
makeWidth = function(inputWidth) {
  if (inputWidth>826) {
    return 340
  }
  else {
    return (width-100) / 2
  }
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
germanLocale = d3.formatLocale({
  decimal: ",",
  thousands: "",
  grouping: [3], 
  currency: ["€", " "],
})

hexToRgb = function(hex) {
  const bigint = parseInt(hex.replace(/^#/, ""), 16)
  const r = (bigint >> 16) & 255
  const g = (bigint >> 8) & 255
  const b = bigint & 255
  return `(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
colors = [
  "#72bb6f",
  "#559bd5",
  "#f3d039",
  "#c3423f", 
  "#12a7e7",
  "#96b428",
  "#559e8f",
  "#f3d039",
  "#559e8f",
  "#2d5b5e",
]
colors_diverging = [
  "#2d76b3", 
  "#559bd5", 
  "#99c4e6",
  "#bbd7ee", 
  "#ddebf7", 
  "#e3f1e2", 
  "#c7e3c6", 
  "#abd6a9", 
  "#72bb6f", 
  "#4b9847",
]
colors_npr = [
  "#D62021",
  "#000000",
  "#237BBD",
]
colors_burger = [
  "#D62300",
  "#FF8732",
  "#502314",
  "#F5EBDC",
  "#198737",
  "#FFAA00",
]
colors_oekostrom = [
  "#05a56f",
  "#eb6761",
  "#b4e800",
  "#26c4d3",
  "#d28cec",
  "#aaaaaa",
  "#ffffff",
  "#ffd925"
]
colors_fiw = [
  "#3e5ba2", // deep blue
  "#df5154", // vibrant red
  "#4caf50", // green
  "#ffb74d", // orange
  "#9575cd", // purple
  "#26c6da", // cyan
  "#f06292", // pink
  "#ffd54f"  // yellow
]

// Lebensmittel (Food)
path1 = "M20 6c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2H6c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v1h16V6zM4 9h16v1.5H4V9zm0 3h16v1.5H4V12zm2 4c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v1c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h12c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2v-1c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2H6z"

// Wohnen (Housing)
path2 = "M10 20v-6h4v6h5v-8h3L12 3 2 12h3v8z"

// Energie (Energy)
path3 = "M9 21c0 .55.45 1 1 1h4c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-1H9v1zm3-19C8.14 2 5 5.14 5 9c0 2.38 1.19 4.47 3 5.74V17c0 .55.45 1 1 1h6c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-2.26c1.81-1.27 3-3.36 3-5.74 0-3.86-3.14-7-7-7z"

// Mobilität (Mobility)
path4 = "M18.92 6.01C18.72 5.42 18.16 5 17.5 5h-11c-.66 0-1.21.42-1.42 1.01L3 12v8c0 .55.45 1 1 1h1c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-1h12v1c0 .55.45 1 1 1h1c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-8l-2.08-5.99zM6.5 16c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5S5.67 13 6.5 13s1.5.67 1.5 1.5S7.33 16 6.5 16zm11 0c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5s.67-1.5 1.5-1.5 1.5.67 1.5 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5zM5 11l1.5-4.5h11L19 11H5z"

// Güter (Goods)
path5 = "M7 18c-1.1 0-1.99.9-1.99 2S5.9 22 7 22s2-.9 2-2-.9-2-2-2zM1 2v2h2l3.6 7.59-1.35 2.45c-.16.28-.25.61-.25.96 0 1.1.9 2 2 2h12v-2H7.42c-.14 0-.25-.11-.25-.25l.03-.12.9-1.63h7.45c.75 0 1.41-.41 1.75-1.03l3.58-6.49c.08-.14.12-.31.12-.48 0-.55-.45-1-1-1H5.21l-.94-2H1zm16 16c-1.1 0-1.99.9-1.99 2s.89 2 1.99 2 2-.9 2-2-.9-2-2-2z"

// Dienstleistungen (Services)
path6 = "M12 17.27L18.18 21l-1.64-7.03L22 9.24l-7.19-.61L12 2 9.19 8.63 2 9.24l5.46 4.73L5.82 21z"

// Emissionen (Emissions - Factory with smoke)
path7 = "M55.2,24.3V23.08a1.27,1.27,0,0,0-1.27-1.27h0l-.17-3.48h.21a1.26,1.26,0,0,0,1.27-1.26V15.85a1.26,1.26,0,0,0-1.27-1.26H46.8a1.26,1.26,0,0,0-1.27,1.26v1.22a1.26,1.26,0,0,0,1.27,1.26h.11l-.17,3.49a1.26,1.26,0,0,0-1.21,1.26V24.3a1.27,1.27,0,0,0,1,1.24L45.45,48.21H38.66L37.65,30a1.27,1.27,0,0,0,1.07-1.25V27.55a1.27,1.27,0,0,0-1.27-1.26h0l-.2-3.48h.2a1.27,1.27,0,0,0,1.27-1.27V20.33a1.27,1.27,0,0,0-1.27-1.27H30.32a1.26,1.26,0,0,0-1.26,1.27v1.21a1.26,1.26,0,0,0,1.26,1.27h.11l-.2,3.48a1.27,1.27,0,0,0-1.17,1.26v1.22A1.26,1.26,0,0,0,30,30L29,48.21H22.13l-.88-13.73a1.26,1.26,0,0,0,1-1.23V32A1.25,1.25,0,0,0,21,30.77l-.22-3.49H21A1.25,1.25,0,0,0,22.24,26V24.8A1.25,1.25,0,0,0,21,23.54H13.84a1.26,1.26,0,0,0-1.26,1.26V26a1.26,1.26,0,0,0,1.26,1.26h.1l-.23,3.49A1.28,1.28,0,0,0,12.58,32v1.22a1.27,1.27,0,0,0,.9,1.21L12.2,54.6a1.17,1.17,0,0,0,.32.91,1.23,1.23,0,0,0,.9.39H54.26a1.27,1.27,0,0,0,.9-.38,1.23,1.23,0,0,0,.33-.91L54.07,25.55A1.27,1.27,0,0,0,55.2,24.3ZM37.46,22.18ZM21,26.65ZM54.26,55.27Z M17.27,21.43A2.46,2.46,0,0,0,19,20.7a2.42,2.42,0,0,0,.51-.76A3.55,3.55,0,0,0,22,18.88,3.46,3.46,0,0,0,23,17a4,4,0,1,0-3.07-6.83,4,4,0,0,0-1.17,2.59,3.68,3.68,0,0,0-1.86,1,3.63,3.63,0,0,0-1,3.17,3.92,3.92,0,0,0-.33.27A2.49,2.49,0,0,0,14.8,19a2.48,2.48,0,0,0,2.47,2.47Z M33.75,17.09A2.47,2.47,0,0,0,36,15.61a3.62,3.62,0,0,0,3.43-2.92A4,4,0,0,0,42,11.52a4,4,0,0,0,1.17-2.83A4,4,0,0,0,42,5.85a4,4,0,0,0-6.84,2.6,3.62,3.62,0,0,0-2.87,4.15,2.22,2.22,0,0,0-.33.28,2.41,2.41,0,0,0-.72,1.74,2.46,2.46,0,0,0,2.47,2.47Z M58.63,1.27a4,4,0,0,0-5.67,0,4.05,4.05,0,0,0-1.17,2.6,3.68,3.68,0,0,0-1.86,1,3.59,3.59,0,0,0-1,3.16,3,3,0,0,0-.33.28,2.46,2.46,0,0,0,0,3.49,2.41,2.41,0,0,0,1.74.72,2.45,2.45,0,0,0,1.75-.72,2.63,2.63,0,0,0,.52-.76A3.64,3.64,0,0,0,56,8.11,3.93,3.93,0,0,0,58.63,7a4,4,0,0,0,0-5.68Z"
```
